oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Record Year for Endangered Yellow-naped Babies
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Waugh, David
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 47 Number 1 (December 2020).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Record year for endangered Yellow-naped Amazon babies in Nicaragua projectBy David Waugh Correspondent, Loro Parque FundaciónRRG QHZV LV DOZD\V ZHOFRPH LQ WKHVH WU\LQJ WLPHV RI WKH &29,'- SDQGHPLF DQG VXFK QHZVKDVUHFHQWO\DUULYHGIURP3DVR3DFtILFRD1LF DUDJXDQ 1*2 HQJDJHG LQ FRQVHUYDWLRQ DFWLYLWLHVLQ WKDW FRXQWU\ 3DVR 3DFtILFR¶V PLVVLRQ LV WR UHVWRUH DQGSURWHFWWKH3DFLILF6ORSHHFRV\VWHPVRI0HVRD PHULFDUHFRQQHFWLQJSHRSOHDQGZLOGOLIH*XLGHGE\ 3DVR 3DFtILFR UHVWRULQJ WKHVH GDPDJHG HFRV\VWHPV DQGUHFRQQHFWLQJWKHPWRVXSSRUWZLOGOLIHLVKDSSHQ LQJ WKURXJK ORWV RI SHRSOH ZRUNLQJ KDQG LQ KDQG 6RPH RI WKH NH\ VWUDWHJLHV LQFOXGH SURWHFWLQJ FRUH3DVR3DFtILFRWRDGRSWLWDVDIODJVKLSVSHFLHVDQG WKH/RUR3DUTXH)XQGDFLyQWRFRPPHQFHLWVVXSSRUW([SHULHQFHGWUHH-FOLPEHUFKHFNLQJDQHVWER[Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
